# INGetAvailableRestaurantReservationBookingDefaultsIntentResponseCode.unspecified

**Case**

You chose not to provide default values.

## Declaration

```swift
case unspecified
```

## Discussion

Use this code if you were able to provide defaults but chose not to do so.

## Constants

- **INGetAvailableRestaurantReservationBookingDefaultsIntentResponseCode.success**: You successfully handled the intent.
- **INGetAvailableRestaurantReservationBookingDefaultsIntentResponseCode.failure**: You were unable to provide a set of default values.
